title: LEGO Wicked Welcome to Emerald City Set, Building Toy with Tower Model and Glinda and Elphaba Mini-Doll Figures, Gift for Movie Fans and 9 Plus Year Old Girls & Boys Who Love Dolls House Sets 75684
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Welcome to Emerald City building toy – Kids go on a LEGO adventure as they relive an iconic scene from the Wicked movie with this 3-storey tower set
Wicked LEGO set with 5 mini-dolls – Includes Glinda and Elphaba, The Wizard, Madame Morrible and Fiyero, as well as an Emerald City scene
Kids are at the heart of the magic – Browse the Emerald City’s stores, ride the bike coffee cart, explore the tower’s map room and meet The Wizard
Inspires creative play – This set comes with the Grimmerie spell book, toffee apple stand, The Wizard’s model air balloon and his giant talking head
A spellbinding experience – Check out the other sets (sold separately) inspired by the Wicked movie, all of which feature on the LEGO Builder app
Gift idea for kids and Wicked film fans – This set makes a magical gift for 9-plus-year-old girls, boys and kids who love the Wicked film and doll’s house playsets
Fantasy toys for kids – This Emerald City toy lets kids join Elphaba and Glinda on their adventures in the land of Oz and enjoy more unique LEGO Wicked moments by scanning the set’s hidden QR code
description: From the manufacturer Build the city where magic awaits Put the magic of the Wicked film into kids’ hands as they build this doll’s house playset and explore all its features. Experience the excitement of the Emerald City This collectible toy lets girls, boys and Wicked fans reenact the scene where the girls go to meet the Wizard. LEGO Wicked Welcome to Emerald City Familiar film feature Search for spells in the Grimmerie. Shopping in the big city Browse the cosmetics shop with the mini-dolls. Coffee from the cart Grab an Oz-presso from the bicycle vendor. Many floors to explore The tower toy has 3 stories packed with features. Comes with 5 mini-doll figures Glinda, Elphaba, Madame Morrible, The Wizard and Fiyero. Discover more fun Scan the QR code for more LEGO Wicked online content. Build the magic of Wicked Check out the other LEGO Wicked fantasy model toys inspired by the film (sets sold separately).
